caption: The video captures a professional interview setting at MongoDB World 2022, held at the Javits Center in New York, NY. Two men, both dressed in suits, are seated at a small round table equipped with a laptop and some papers. The interviewer, on the left, gestures with his hand as he speaks, while the interviewee, on the right, listens attentively with his hands clasped together. The background shows a spacious hallway with other attendees walking by, indicating an active conference environment. The event is sponsored by MongoDB, as indicated by the logo and text overlay at the bottom of the screen. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal yet engaging discussion about topics related to MongoDB and technology.
